mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, name AS name, email AS email, nickname AS nickname, password AS password, birth_date AS birthDate, is_foreigner AS isForeigner FROM users WHERE LOWER(email) = LOWER(#{email})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO email_verify (contact_type, contact_value, purpose, code_hash, expires_at, created_at) VALUES ( #{contactType}, #{contactValue}, #{purpose}, SHA2(#{plainCode}, 256), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL #{expireMin} MINUTE), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE code_hash = VALUES(code_hash), expires_at = VALUES(expires_at), created_at = created_at
mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, name AS name, email AS email, nickname AS nickname, password AS password, birth_date AS birthDate, is_foreigner AS isForeigner, tel AS tel FROM users WHERE REPLACE(tel, '-', '') = REPLACE(#{phone}, '-', '') LIMIT 1
